dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes reactive entry after technical confirmation (no anticipation). Used MACD histogram crossing zero as primary signal for trend confirmation combined with ADX >25 for trend strength validation. Exit when signal reverses (MACD crosses back). Stop-loss set to 2x ATR as specified (approximated as 2.0% per parameters). CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction because rule applies to both long and short based on signal direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes reactive entry after technical confirmation (no anticipation). Used MACD histogram crossing zero as primary signal for trend confirmation combined with ADX >25 for trend strength validation. Exit when signal reverses (MACD crosses back). Stop-loss set to 2x ATR as specified (approximated as 2.0% per parameters). CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction because rule applies to both long and short based on signal direction.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter positions only after receiving a technical signal that confirms market direction, rather than predicting direction before the signal occurs.
